arts.ttl: Player wants to join Manchester United ‘immediately’ – Tells agents to sort it, pushing for January transfer
arts.sum: Patrick Dorgu has told Lecce he wants to join Manchester United ‘immediately’ and instructed his agents to get a transfer sorted. That’s according to Solo Lecce, who report that the negotiations for him have become a ‘tug of war’ between the various parties.
